channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rubio visits Vatican amid escalating tensions between Trump and Pope Leo
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio traveled to Rome in an effort to preserve a crucial relationship between Washington and the Holy See.

item.title: DHS blames funding lapse for shutdown of internal detention oversight
item.description: The office investigates detainee deaths and access to medical care, among other issues. It's being wound down, even as the number of detention deaths ...

item.title: Tennessee Republicans pass a map to break up the state's lone Democratic House seat
item.description: Tennessee Republicans' map would crack Shelby County — home to majority-Black Memphis — into three different districts, in an effort to eliminate the ...

item.title: China gives suspended death sentences to 2 ex-defense ministers
item.description: Both were the latest to be sentenced in President Xi Jinping's ongoing anti-corruption campaign, which started more than a decade ago.
